retrieval.description: Lane5 retrieval regression profile: lane3 retrieval path with lane5 feature identity.
retrieval.template: uv run tldrf semantic search "{query}" --path {repo_root} --k {top_k} --lang python --hybrid --rg-pattern "{rg_pattern}" --no-result-guard rg_empty --abstain-threshold 0.35 --abstain-empty --rerank --rerank-top-n 8 --max-latency-ms-p50-ratio 1.10 --max-payload-tokens-median-ratio 0.90 --budget-tokens {budget_tokens}

impact.description: Caller-set impact analysis for a function scoped by file.

notes: Lane5 profile keeps retrieval command identical to lane3 for apples-to-apples regression checks.
Navigate/clustering behavior is evaluated by dedicated deterministic lane5 artifacts.
